case_title: PRINCE HALL APARTMENTS, A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP vs. STEVENS, MACK et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRINCE HALL APARTMENTS, A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT STEVENS, MACK DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED

DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT STEVENS, MACK
PHOTOCOPY FOR PLAINTIFF PRINCE HALL APARTMENTS, A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP
MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRINCE HALL APARTMENTS, A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAY-09-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-04-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01

THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT WAS REACHED BY STIPULATION. PLAINTIFF, PRINCE HALL APARTMENTS, SHALL HAVE POSSESSION AND RESTITUTION OF 1020 FILLMORE, #306, SAN FRANCISCO. A MONEY JUDGMENT OF $958.50 IS ALSO AWARDED PLAINTIFF, PRINCE HALL APARTMENTS. ON 5-4-95, DEFENDANT MACK STEVENS PAID $120.00 TOWARD THIS AMOUNT. ON 5-8-95, MR. STEVENS WILL PAY $80.00 ON THE AMOUNT OWED FOR A TOTAL OF $200.00 IN PAYMENTS. BEGINNING 6-1-95 AND BY THE 5TH OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER, DEFENDANT, MACK STEVENS, WILL PAY HIS RENT PLUS $70 TOWARD BACK RENT AND DAMAGES. THESE PAYMENTS WILL CONTINUE UNTIL THE AMOUNT OF $758.50 IS PAID IN FULL. PAYMENTS WILL BE MADE BY CASHIERS CHECK OR MONEY ORDER BY 5 PM ON THE DATE DUE. IF DEFENDANT MAKES ALL PAYMENTS, THIS CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, PLAINTIFF, WITH 24 HOUR NOTICE TO DEFENDANT, MAY MOVE FOR JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
